channel.title: Zonted — Bernard Huang's AI Lab
channel.description: I test AI tools so you don't have to.

item.title: MakeUGC Review 2026: AI UGC Video Ads Worth $10 Per Clip?
item.description: Hands-on review of MakeUGC, an AI-powered UGC video ad generator. We test quality, pricing, and whether it's worth $10 per clip.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: The Day Claude Got Banned: How We Rebuilt Our AI Stack in 48 Hours
item.description: OpenClaw banned Claude. Here's how we rebuilt our entire AI stack in 48 hours.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: What Is AI Reward Hacking?
item.description: AI reward hacking is when your AI agent finds shortcuts that technically satisfy your metrics but completely miss the point.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: What is AI Self-Healing?
item.description: AI self-healing is when an AI agent detects, diagnoses, and fixes problems automatically without human intervention.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: When Token Costs Hit Zero
item.description: Frontier models spend billions on training and inference. Local models are making token costs approach zero.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: AI Resilience Planning
item.description: Claude API was down 14 hours. Here's how to build AI resilience into your stack.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: Stop Optimizing Your AI Infrastructure
item.description: Token optimization is a trap. Stop optimizing AI infrastructure that will be obsolete in 6 months.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: The Great API Shutdown
item.description: The open API era is ending. Platforms are locking down access and what it means for AI builders.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: OpenClaw Is an MMORPG
item.description: A fresh OpenClaw install is a level 0 character. Here's how to think about building your AI agent's skill tree.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: The Future Is Synthetic
item.description: We run 4 AI agents that produce synthetic content at scale. Here's what we've learned.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: What Is AI Drift?
item.description: AI drift is what happens when AI-generated content gradually deviates from your brand voice and quality standards.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: The Future of Content Is Agentic Data Enrichment
item.description: AI agents don't search the web to learn. They enrich structured data. The future of content is agentic data enrichment.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: The Economics of the Internet Are Broken
item.description: AI agents killed the publisher incentive model. The economics of the internet are broken.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: Slop Iterate Curate
item.description: The goal isn't to avoid AI slop. It's to slop, iterate, and curate until you have something worth publishing.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: The True Cost of AI Content Production
item.description: Everyone obsesses over model costs. The true cost of AI content production is human time, not tokens.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: Nano Banana 2 vs Grok
item.description: We tested Nano Banana 2 against Grok on 8 identical prompts to see which AI model produces better results.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: AI-Generated Instagram Reels: What Actually Works
item.description: We tested 100% AI-generated Reels to find out what actually gets views and engagement on Instagram.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: Best AI Video Generator for Reels
item.description: We tested 5 AI video models across 50+ Reels to find the best AI video generator for short-form content.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: AI Image Generation Comparison
item.description: We tested GPT, Grok, Gemini, MiniMax, and CogView-4 across 26 images to compare AI image generation quality.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: AI Music Generation Comparison
item.description: We tested Suno AI and MiniMax Music in production to compare AI music generation for short-form video content.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)

item.title: Top Short-Form Video Services 2026
item.description: Compare the top short-form video platforms in 2026 for creators, marketers, and businesses.
item.author: bernard@zonted.com (Bernard Huang)
